question: Who was arrested in February 2015 as part of Operation Castanheira for illegal deforestation in the Amazon?
ground_truth: Ezequiel Antônio Castanha, considered the biggest Amazon deforester of all time, was arrested.
event_desc: Six months since the beginning of Operation Castanheira, Ezequiel Antônio Castanha, who is considered to be the biggest Amazon deforester of all time, is arrested. This was a joint operation by the Federal Police, the Brazilian Institute of the Environment, the Federal Public Ministry, the Federal Revenue Service, and the National Public Security Force.
